'''Tonoté''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] who was the daughter of [[Yander (Ord Cestus)|Yander]], a native of [[Ord Cestus/Legends|Ord Cestus]] who worked as a miner; her father was once the partner of [[Sheeka Tull]]. She had two brothers named [[Tarl (Ord Cestus)|Tarl]] and [[Mithail]].
